name: real-estate-project
description: Real Estate Management System with Next.js and NestJS

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:website" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:website && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../website && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:server" "npm run start:website" "npm run start:dashboard"
